leadText: Basil (Japanese: バジル Basil) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very bitter ingredient that's quite versatile, as herbs go. It's fragrant and goes well with tomatoes.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Deli Cioso , Aquiesta Supermarket (after earning 3 Gym Badges ) S V ID Vending machines ( Terarium )
